basis.founded: 2023 (open-source on GitHub by Hugo Demenez, hugodemenez/deltalytix repository; TypeScript, CC-BY-NC-4.0 license; ~112 stars as of 2026)
basis.target_market: Futures traders specifically (Rithmic, Tradovate, NinjaTrader, Quantower, Topstep, Thor copier). Heavy prop-firm-futures focus. Engineering-friendly (open-source, GitHub). Global, English. Smaller community than TradeZella/Tradervue but transparent and developer-trusted.
basis.pricing_model: Freemium with strong free tier. Basic: free (multiple accounts, 14 rolling days of data storage, basic CSV imports, all core AI features). Plus: paid (monthly/quarterly/yearly with a 'lifetime access' limited-time one-time payment option — actual prices appear dynamically loaded and not visible in static scrape; redacted as $000$000 placeholders in HTML). Plus adds unlimited accounts, unlimited data storage, chat with data using advanced AI models. [uncertain on exact Plus pricing]

ai_features.feature_name: AI Trading Coach + AI-Powered Journaling + AI Data Analytics + 'Chat with your data'
ai_features.ai_scope: Per-trade (AI-assisted journal entries analyze for emotional patterns + biases), per-period (pattern identification, note-taking summaries), per-portfolio (chat with full data using LLM). Data-aware conversations.
ai_features.ai_proactive_vs_reactive: Hybrid. Push: AI auto-analyzes journal entries for emotional patterns + biases, generates summaries, identifies patterns. Pull: Chat-with-data interface lets user query trading history in natural language.
ai_features.ai_minimum_trade_threshold: Free tier supports AI on minimal data (14-day rolling window). No hard minimum. [uncertain]
ai_features.ai_underlying_tech: 'Advanced AI models' for chat (likely OpenAI GPT-4-class or Anthropic Claude — actual model not disclosed publicly, though open-source repo would reveal). Fair-usage limits on AI interactions. [uncertain — verifiable via GitHub source]
ai_features.output_format: Conversational chat with data, AI-generated journal summaries, pattern-identification cards, interactive charts/graphs, calendar view (daily/weekly P&L with high-impact news filter), drag-and-drop dashboard widgets.
ai_features.notable_prompts: Inferred from feature descriptions: 'Analyze my emotional patterns in this journal entry', 'What patterns do you see in my last 30 trades?', 'Summarize my best and worst trades this week', 'Why did I lose money on Tuesday?', 'How does my performance change after a losing day?'. The 'chat with your data' framing is open-ended natural language. [uncertain — exact prompt examples not public]

playbook_depth.playbook_concept_maturity: tag-only / approaching named-strategy. Advanced tagging is a Basic feature. No explicit 'playbook with promotion rules' like TSB. AI helps with pattern identification but no rule-adherence scoring system marketed.
playbook_depth.setup_level_ai: Pattern identification across trades exists, but not explicitly per-setup with named strategies. Trades-by-tag analytics likely supported. Setup-level AI commentary not the marketed killer feature.
playbook_depth.playbook_template_library: No shared template library. Users build via advanced tagging. [uncertain]

privacy_stack.privacy_model: Hybrid leaning vendor-hosted, but with strong privacy posture. Open-source codebase (auditable). Rithmic credentials stored locally on user's computer (not on vendor servers) for security reasons — sync engine accesses them only when user is connected. Tradovate uses OAuth (read-only). Thor uploads via user-controlled software. Local-only option under development.
privacy_stack.data_residency: Cloud (vendor servers) for synced trade history. Rithmic credentials stay local. Plus plan: 'Cloud storage guaranteed for 1 year, then subject to availability'. GitHub repo enables self-hosting (advanced users).
privacy_stack.cost_per_month_user: Free tier viable for AI exploration (with 14-day data window limitation). Plus tier: variable pricing not transparently displayed. Lifetime option exists. AI included in tier (subject to fair-usage limits) — no separate API surcharge. [uncertain on exact Plus pricing]

crypto_fit.crypto_perp_exchange_support: None native. Pure futures focus (Rithmic, Tradovate, NinjaTrader). No Hyperliquid/Blofin/MEXC/Bybit/Binance support. Crypto would be via generic CSV only.
crypto_fit.multi_asset: Futures (primary, native sync). Some support for any CSV-importable asset class but not marketed. No stocks/options/forex/crypto native.
crypto_fit.partial_close_awareness: Futures-trader focus — scale-in/scale-out is normal. Per-contract Avg Net P/L tracking implies multi-execution awareness. Specific per-TP multi-leg analytics not detailed. [uncertain]
crypto_fit.gap_session_breakdown_per_setup: Calendar view with Max Profit & Max DD by week + daily impact-filtered news, plus decile statistics. Per-setup × per-session not explicitly marketed.

coaching_depth.coaching_depth_level: deep_pattern_analysis on the journaling side (AI analyzes entries for emotional patterns + biases); approaches surface_metrics on the analytics side (interactive charts/graphs/calendar — user-driven interpretation).
coaching_depth.psychology_metrics: AI-assisted emotional pattern identification, bias detection in journal entries. No tiltmeter / discipline score / revenge-detection auto-tags marketed. [uncertain]
coaching_depth.mentor_mode: Discord community for peer discussion. Open-source contribution model. No formal coach-review-student feature.

community.community_driven_ai: Discord community + GitHub repo for open-source contributions. AI itself is per-user, not community-shared.
community.changelog_ai_velocity: Active updates page (deltalytix.app/updates). Open roadmap. GitHub commits visible — repo last updated 14 days ago (as of fetch). Frequent feature iteration. [uncertain on AI-specific cadence]
